description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a light-colored, wood-textured tabletop and a central circular cable management grommet. The desk is supported by two sturdy, angular metal legs with a dark finish, each forming a Z-shape for stability and style. The legs are connected by a horizontal support bar at the rear, enhancing structural integrity. The tabletop is spacious and flat, suitable for a variety of tasks, and the grommet allows for organized cable routing. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with no drawers or additional storage features. The materials and construction suggest it is intended for high-traffic environments such as offices or classrooms.
description: A modern rectangular desk with a light wood-textured top, dark angular metal legs, and a central cable grommet. The design is minimalist and functional, ideal for work or study.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the light wood-textured tabletop, both angular metal legs, and the central cable grommet.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the tabletop and the Z-shaped metal leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the horizontal support bar connecting the legs and the cable grommet near the back edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the Z-shaped leg and the cable grommet's position relative to the tabletop.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with unobstructed leg space and the cable grommet positioned centrally, while the rear has a horizontal support bar.
